moments.title: World Cup Final Day
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 concludes today with the final match between Spain and Argentina, after England's semi-final exit earlier this week.

angles.name: Final Match Build-up
angles.copy: It's the biggest game in football today! Who are you backing to lift the World Cup trophy, Spain or Argentina? #WorldCupFinal

moments.title: The Open Championship Concludes
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale, one of golf's most prestigious tournaments, wraps up today.

angles.name: Golf's Grand Finale
angles.copy: It's Sunday at Royal Birkdale, meaning the Claret Jug is up for grabs! Who will be crowned Champion Golfer of the Year at The Open today?

moments.title: Glasgow Prepares for Commonwealth Games
moments.blurb: The 2026 Commonwealth Games are set to kick off in Glasgow this Thursday, July 23rd, bringing a major international multi-sport event to Scotland.

angles.name: Glasgow Gets Ready
angles.copy: Just a few days to go until the Commonwealth Games officially begin in Glasgow! Who's excited for some world-class action on home soil? #Glasgow2026

moments.title: Bruno Mars Continues Wembley Residency
moments.blurb: Bruno Mars continues his highly anticipated five-night residency at Wembley Stadium this week, with shows on July 22, 24, and 25.

angles.name: 24K Magic in London
angles.copy: Bruno Mars is still lighting up Wembley this week! If you're heading to one of his shows, get ready for some serious 24K Magic. ✨

moments.title: Latitude Festival Kicks Off This Week
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, one of the UK's premier music and arts events, starts on Thursday, July 23rd, at Henham Park in Suffolk, running until July 26th.

angles.name: Festival Fever
angles.copy: Get your wellies ready! Latitude Festival is almost here, bringing music, comedy & arts to Suffolk from Thursday. Who's got their tickets?

moments.title: Truck Festival Begins Thursday
moments.blurb: Truck Festival, Oxfordshire's indie-focused music event, starts on Thursday, July 23rd, running until July 26th.

angles.name: Indie Anthems
angles.copy: Truck Festival is just days away! Ready for a weekend of brilliant indie and alternative acts in Oxfordshire? #TruckFestival

moments.title: Sam Fender / Olivia Dean at UK No.1
moments.blurb: The UK Official Singles Chart for the week of July 10th sees 'Rein Me In' by Sam Fender and Olivia Dean holding the number one spot.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: Still at number one on the UK Singles Chart! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is the sound of the summer. What's your favourite track on the chart right now?

moments.title: New BBC Comedy 'Ann Droid'
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan's new quirky comedy 'Ann Droid' is a highlight of new British TV releases this July on the BBC, exploring an unlikely friendship with an eldercare robot.

angles.name: New British Comedy
angles.copy: Diane Morgan is back! Her new comedy 'Ann Droid' on the BBC looks hilarious, blending everyday British life with a futuristic twist. Anyone watching?

moments.title: Legally Blonde Prequel 'Elle' on Prime Video
moments.blurb: The 'Legally Blonde' prequel series 'Elle', following a teenage Elle Woods, premiered on Prime Video on July 1st and is available to stream now.

angles.name: What, Like It's Hard?
angles.copy: Bend and snap! The Legally Blonde prequel 'Elle' is out now on Prime Video. Are you tuning in to see a young Elle Woods?

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday Brian May
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Sending huge birthday wishes to the iconic Brian May of Queen, who turns 79 today! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

moments.title: Happy 33rd Birthday Fred again..
moments.blurb: The acclaimed British DJ and producer Fred again.. celebrates his 33rd birthday today.

angles.name: Dance Floor Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to the one and only Fred again..! What track of his gets you moving every time?

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his unique blend of rock, blues, and Latin rhythms, turns 79 tomorrow.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to the incredible Carlos Santana for tomorrow! His music is timeless. What's your favourite Santana track?

moments.title: Happy 70th Birthday Paul Cook
moments.blurb: Paul Cook, drummer for the iconic punk band Sex Pistols, celebrates his 70th birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Punk Icon
angles.copy: Happy 70th Birthday to Paul Cook of the Sex Pistols for tomorrow! An absolute punk legend. #SexPistols

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday Don Henley
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder, drummer, and lead vocalist for the Eagles, turns 79 on July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to Don Henley of The Eagles on Wednesday! What's your favourite Eagles classic he sang lead on?

moments.title: Happy 61st Birthday Slash
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses' iconic lead guitarist, Slash, celebrates his 61st birthday on July 23rd.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the legendary Slash this Thursday! That top hat and those riffs are unmistakable. What's your favourite GNR track?

moments.title: Happy 37th Birthday Daniel Radcliffe
moments.blurb: British actor Daniel Radcliffe, best known for playing Harry Potter, turns 37 on July 23rd.

angles.name: Wizarding World Star
angles.copy: Happy 37th Birthday to Daniel Radcliffe this Thursday! From Hogwarts to Broadway, what's your favourite role he's taken on?

moments.title: Happy 57th Birthday Jennifer Lopez
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on July 24th.

angles.name: J.Lo's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the one and only J.Lo this Friday! Still bringing the heat to music, film and fashion. What's your favourite J.Lo anthem?

moments.title: Happy 83rd Birthday Mick Jagger
moments.blurb: The Rolling Stones' legendary frontman Mick Jagger turns 83 on July 26th.

angles.name: Rock's Enduring Icon
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger turns 83 on Sunday?! Still has more energy than most people half his age! What's your favourite Stones track?

moments.title: Happy 77th Birthday Maureen McGovern
moments.blurb: American singer and Broadway actress Maureen McGovern, known for 'The Morning After', turns 77 on July 27th.

angles.name: Power Ballad Queen
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 77th Birthday to the incredible Maureen McGovern this Monday! 'The Morning After' is still a classic.

moments.title: Happy 33rd Birthday Cher Lloyd
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter Cher Lloyd, who rose to fame on The X Factor, celebrates her 33rd birthday on July 28th.

angles.name: X Factor Star
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to Cher Lloyd this Tuesday! Remember 'Swagger Jagger'? What's your favourite track from her?

moments.title: Happy 73rd Birthday Geddy Lee
moments.blurb: Geddy Lee, the iconic lead vocalist, bassist, and keyboardist for the progressive rock band Rush, turns 73 on July 29th.

angles.name: Rush Legend
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to the incredible Geddy Lee of Rush this Wednesday! A true pioneer of progressive rock. What's your favourite Rush album?
